member.name: T:HookEntityId
member.summary:
The ID of an entity using a hook.

This class represents the HookEntityId protobuf message, which can be either an account ID or a contract ID.

member.name: M:HookEntityId.#ctor(AccountId)
member.summary: Create a HookEntityId with an account ID.

member.name: M:HookEntityId.#ctor(ContractId)
member.summary: Create a HookEntityId with a contract ID.

member.name: M:HookEntityId.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert this HookEntityId to a protobuf message.

member.name: M:HookEntityId.FromProtobuf(Proto.HookEntityId)
member.summary: Create a HookEntityId from a protobuf message.
